debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst✝ : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v : V
p : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G u v
⊢ ∑ e, @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeCount V inst✝ G u v p ↑e = @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.length V G u v p

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
rw [sum_eq_multiset_sum]
  have h₁ : ∀ (l : List (Sym2 V)) (e : Sym2 V),
      (l.map (fun d => dartEdge d)).countP (· = e) = l.count (d : V × V | dartEdge d = e) := by
    intro l e
    simp [List.countP]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try
      {
        induction l with
        | nil => simp
        | cons a l ih =>
          simp_all [List.count_cons, List.countP_cons]
          <;>
          by_cases h : dartEdge a = e <;>
          simp_all [h]
          <;>
          aesop
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [List.count_cons, List.countP_cons]
        <;>
        by_cases h : dartEdge (· : V × V) = e <;>
        simp_all [h]
        <;>
        aesop
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [List.count_cons, List.countP_cons]
        <;>
        by_cases h : (· : V × V) = e <;>
        simp_all [h]
        <;>
        aesop
      })
  have h₂ : (p.edges.countP (· = e) : ℕ) = p.edges.count (d : V × V | dartEdge d = e) := by
    apply h₁
  have h₃ : (∑ e : (p.edgeSet : Finset (Sym2 V)), p.edgeCount p e : ℕ) = p.length := by
    calc
      (∑ e : (p.edgeSet : Finset (Sym2 V)), p.edgeCount p e : ℕ) =
          (∑ e : (p.edgeSet : Finset (Sym2 V)), p.edges.countP (· = e) : ℕ) := by
        simp [edgeCount]
      _ = ∑ e : (p.edgeSet : Finset (Sym2 V)),
          p.edges.count (d : V × V | dartEdge d = e) := by
        apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
        intro e _
        rw [h₂]
      _ = (p.edges.toFinset : Finset (Sym2 V)).sum (fun e => p.edges.count (d : V × V | dartEdge d = e)) := by
        simp [p.edgeSet]
      _ = (p.edges.toFinset : Finset (Sym2 V)).sum (fun e => p.edges.count (d : V × V | dartEdge d = e)) := by rfl
      _ = p.edges.sum (fun d => 1) := by
        calc
          (p.edges.toFinset : Finset (Sym2 V)).sum (fun e => p.edges.count (d : V × V | dartEdge d = e)) =
              (p.edges.toFinset : Finset (Sym2 V)).sum (fun e => p.edges.count (d : V × V | dartEdge d = e)) := by rfl
          _ = p.edges.sum (fun d => 1) := by
            -- Use the fact that the sum of counts over the finset is the sum of 1s over the list
            have h₄ : ∀ (l : List (Sym2 V)), (l.toFinset : Finset (Sym2 V)).sum (fun e => l.count (d : V × V | dartEdge d = e)) = l.sum (fun d => 1) := by
              intro l
              calc
                (l.toFinset : Finset (Sym2 V)).sum (fun e => l.count (d : V × V | dartEdge d = e)) =
                    l.toFinset.sum (fun e => l.count (d : V × V | dartEdge d = e)) := by rfl
                _ = l.sum (fun d => 1) := by
                  -- Prove by induction on the list
                  have h₅ : ∀ (l : List (Sym2 V)), l.toFinset.sum (fun e => l.count (d : V × V | dartEdge d = e)) = l.sum (fun d => 1) := by
                    intro l
                    induction l with
                    | nil => simp
                    | cons a l ih =>
                      simp_all [List.toFinset_cons, Finset.sum_insert, Finset.mem_singleton, List.count_cons]
                      <;>
                      (try decide) <;>
                      (try
                        {
                          simp_all [List.count_cons, List.countP_cons]
                          <;>
                          by_cases h : a = e <;>
                          simp_all [h]
                          <;>
                          aesop
                        }) <;>
                      (try
                        {
                          simp_all [List.count_cons, List.countP_cons]
                          <;>
                          by_cases h : a = e <;>
                          simp_all [h]
                          <;>
                          aesop
                        })
                  exact h₅ l
            have h₅ := h₄ p.edges
            simp_all
      _ = p.edges.length := by
        simp [List.sum_const]
        <;>
        simp_all [List.length]
      _ = p.length := by
        simp [edges, darts, length]
        <;>
        (try decide) <;>
        (try
          {
            induction p with
            | nil => simp
            | cons u v' u v h p ih =>
              simp_all [G.Adj, darts, edges, length]
              <;>
              aesop
            | loop u v p ih =>
              simp_all [G.Adj, darts, edges, length]
              <;>
              aesop
          })
  -- Use the above results to complete the proof
  simpa [edges, darts, length] using h₃
